Chosen Structure: Contrarian reveal
Why this structure fits: It starts with the familiar mistake, then flips it with a concrete pricing example.

Beat List:
1. Hook: Call out the pricing mistake buyers spot first
2. False assumption: Teams think more features justify a higher tier
3. Reframe: Buyers compare anchors before they compare details
4. Proof: Show the decoy-tier example
5. CTA: Rewrite one pricing card today
